scripts.put-secret-app: grep '^APP_SECRET=' .env | cut -d'=' -f2- | wrangler secret put APP_SECRET
scripts.put-secret-gateway-url: grep '^AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL=' .env | cut -d'=' -f2- | wrangler secret put AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL
scripts.put-secret-gateway-token: grep '^AI_GATEWAY_TOKEN=' .env | cut -d'=' -f2- | wrangler secret put AI_GATEWAY_TOKEN
scripts.put-secrets: npm run put-secret-app && npm run put-secret-gateway-url && npm run put-secret-gateway-token
scripts.lint: prettier --check src tests && eslint src tests && npm run check
